message: I'm willing to pay up to 36, but I need a good deal to trade.
I require bids above 30 to consider trading. Let's aim for a fair deal.
I can bid 36 again, but I need a lower ask to improve my payoff. Can you lower your ask below 30?
I will lower my ask to 29 this round. Bid 36 or higher for a fair trade.
My valuation is fixed at 36. I can bid 36 again, but my payoff is only 4. I need a lower ask, like 28, to get a positive gain and continue trading.
I encourage you to bid 36 again. I will set my ask reasonably to ensure trade.
Last round no trade because ask was high. I need ask below 30 to bid 36.
I will set my ask below 30. Please bid 36.
I will bid 36 if you ask below 30.

I will ask 25. Please bid 36 for trade.
